name: Spinach Brown Rice Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the melted butter evenly over the cooked brown rice.
2. Mix together the thawed spinach, chopped green onion, beaten eggs, shredded Velveeta cheese, and Tabasco sauce in a large bowl until combined.
3. Carefully pour the mixture into a large lightly greased casserole dish.
4. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
5. Allow the quiche to cool before cutting and serving.
